product_results.title: Ailun 3 Pack Screen Protector for iPhone 16 Pro [6.3 inch] + 3 Pack Camera Lens Protector with Installation Frame,Case Friendly Tempered Glass Film,[9H Hardness] - HD

summary.text: Customers find this screen protector to be a very good product with nice quality. The protector is very easy to apply and fits perfectly on devices. Users report that it works good with no problems during installation. However, some customers experience issues with adhesion, while opinions on durability and bubble-free application vary among users.

authors_reviews.title: Best screen protector bundle for the price — I keep buying Ailun
authors_reviews.text: I keep coming back to Ailun screen protectors because the quality is honestly great and the price is basically unbeatable. This pack is a no-brainer — you get multiple screen protectors and camera lens protectors, which is perfect because I always like having backups.The biggest thing I appreciate is the installation frame/guide. It makes it so much easier to line everything up properly and get it on straight without stressing about it. The protector goes on clean, looks clear, and doesn’t mess with touch sensitivity.Fits well with my case too and once it’s on, you barely notice it’s there. If you want a solid protector setup without overpaying, this is the one I’d recommend.
authors_reviews.author: Scott

authors_reviews.title: BEST SCREEN PROTECTOR ON THE MARKET!
authors_reviews.text: These are the best screen protectors I have EVER bought. They finally made an installation soooo easy and quick I was shocked.I will only buy these going forward if needed.Well worth the cost and the fit is perfect.
authors_reviews.author: Amazon Customer

authors_reviews.title: Great item!
authors_reviews.text: Great fit, the guide makes it literally effortless to put on. The camera covers are great too.
authors_reviews.author: Megan Ducharme

authors_reviews.title: Screen protector ok. Camera protector affects focusing in dim lighting
authors_reviews.text: I had no problems applying the screen protector to the phone. I have the iPhone 14 Pro Max. This protector is slightly smaller than some other brands I have used. It leaves about 1 mm space of uncovered screen all around the perimeter. Some people will not like this. For now I am living with it and I have not had too much dirt trapped in this area. I’ve had it for a week now.I have not experienced any cracking of the glass yet. I believe this is largely dependent on the phone case you are using. I have dropped my phone a few times and no cracks yet. You need to have a phone case that can absorb some impact (not the thin plastic ones), raised borders (so contact does not come with screen or glass), etc. (I have the Tech21 FlexQuartz case)I was able to apply the screen with zero air bubbles or dust particles, but this is also on a new phone (no history of bending it or dropping it) and some experience in applying screen protectors. I used the hinge method, using the two hinge stickers provided.This is the first time I use the camera protector for a phone. It is cut out so well that it slides on like a perfect fit. I had no issues with it going into the phone case. It has a slight adhesive surface so it sticks well. It looks like it can protect the cameras well. I was initially very excited about this because I have experienced moisture entry into camera lens several times with minimal amount of water exposure. (e.g. water on table). I was really hoping this could provide additional protection.My only issue with the camera protector is focus. When taking photos of groups of people, and the camera recognizes faces, for some reason with the camera protector on it wants to jump between different cameras back and forth, and with each jump it tries to refocus. Otherwise on other brightly lit objects, general photos, etc., there are no issues.The focus issue is most apparent when I try to take photos of stars. It is unable to focus on the stars, and sticking with only one of the cameras. I was able to remove the camera protector easily with a credit card flicking it off. Once removed, I can take photos of stars.See photos.Overall, screen protector seems to work well, slightly short on the edges. The camera protector is a great idea to keep moisture out of the lens and to keep them from scratching. There are minimal issues with focusing in brightly lit situations. However, difficulty taking photos of the night sky with the camera protector on. Since I love astrophotography, I took off the camera protector.
authors_reviews.author: details are important

authors_reviews.title: Good purchase
authors_reviews.text: I was pleasantly surprised with these Ailun screen protectors — the 3-pack is perfect, so I have spares ready when I need them. Installation was pretty smooth and I didn’t struggle with bubbles at all. Once on, the screen stays clear and responsive, and it’s handled a couple of accidental bumps without a scratch. For the price, I honestly think it’s a great deal.
authors_reviews.author: Raghav

authors_reviews.title: This is my second purchase, very good product~
authors_reviews.text: I have to say this screen protector is excellent. It’s very easy to install, and removing bubbles is simple. This is my second purchase, and I’m very satisfied
authors_reviews.author: Alan Zhang

authors_reviews.title: Good value, good protection
authors_reviews.text: Very easy to put on (especially if you know someone good at doing this as I do 😊), it has extra materials in case you (inevitably?) break or lose one or need to reattach it, and the instructions are clear. It would be better if they included a device (usually made of plastic) to do set it without risk of air bubbles, but you can’t have everything I guess.Either way this is a value. I am not sure how durable it is (and hope I never need to find out) but when applied properly it is invisible. Touch function is not affected either. I also like that a camera island cover was included.5 stars. I will revise downward if this product fails to provide the protection advertised
authors_reviews.author: Briar Hill
